commit.subject: LU-8095 lnet: switch LNET_* static functions to lower case
commit.message:
LU-8095 lnet: switch LNET_* static functions to lower case

Replace the upper-case names with lower-case names for the following
static inline functions in LNet :
LNET_NIDADDR
LNET_NIDNET
LNET_MKNID
LNET_NETNUM
LNET_NETTYP
LNET_MKNET

Signed-off-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I69b01fd843ff7dbbf2b80b1f326166cff2d319c4
